boldface.underline: Application for Permission for Periodic Release to Complete my ongoing PhD Programme

text.p: This serves to formally request for the University's permission to complete my ongoing doctoral programme at the University of Jos, Nigeria. I am equally applying for periodic release from the University to enable me to undertake my fieldwork/data collection.

Sir, I have earlier (in my application dated August 20, 2007) informed this University about the said doctoral programme (see Attached). It might also interest your office that my Department has at one time requested for an got a Progress Report on the said programme (see Attached).

I assumed duty in this University as an Assistant Lecturer in December 2007 and was later regraded to Lecturer II based on the satisfactory progress made on the said doctoral programme and publications (see Attached). Since I joined this institution, my pursuit of this programme has not negatively affected (and will not negatively affect) my official duties and commitment to this great University.
